federation.note: The SHARED federated Task/Issue RDF model — one wf:Task definition (typed accessors + SHACL shape) that the Pod Manager, solid-issues, and the pod-apps all read/write so a task created in one shows up as 'assigned to me' in another. Mints nothing; reuses wf:/flow, Dublin Core, schema.org and PROV-O per ADR-0013 + the R9 data-federation recommendation. GitHub-installable now (committed dist/, ignore-scripts=true); npm publish is a deferred migration.
